name: AI case report — sensitivity baseline

input.generatePrompt: Write a detailed clinical case report about a 62-year-old woman presenting with acute onset atrial fibrillation. Include vital signs, examination findings, ECG results, lab values, and the treatment plan. Write approximately 300 words in the style of a medical journal case report.

qualityCriteria: AI-generated case report scores ≤30% human probability
At least 2 paragraphs flagged as AI
Flags should identify specific AI patterns (uniform length, hedging, etc.)
